name: sentinel
description: Comprehensive AI security toolkit for Claude Code: 5 expert personas (advisor, white-box, black-box browser-DAST, CEH, OWASP) across 6 scopes (uncommitted+unpushed diff, whole project, a URL, one API, all APIs, natural-language router). Covers OWASP Top 10 + API Top 10 + LLM Top 10, full CEH methodology, injection/RCE/misconfig, secrets, dependency CVEs + SBOM, auth/JWT/headers. Live targets use a Playwright-driven AI DAST behind a hard authorization gate.
